preview_text:
The model favors Croatia at 79%, treating them as heavy favorites. Ghana's win probability stands at 3%, leaving a 19-point gap to the underdog.

The model's spread suggests a match tilted decisively toward a Croatia victory, though it assigns a meaningful 18% chance to a draw. A Ghana win remains a low-probability outcome in this forecast. The gap between the favorite and underdog implies Croatia enters as a clear but not overwhelming choice on the basis of the numbers alone.

The model and market diverge substantially. Sportsbooks assign Croatia 58% to win—21 percentage points lower than the model—and rate Ghana's win probability at 17%, some 14 points higher than the model projects. Polymarket prices align closely with the sportsbook consensus. The dashboard does not adjudicate which reading is correct; the gap reflects material disagreement about the relative strength of the two teams.
